testcase.name: test_seal_packet_generates_proofs

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_acn_cross_border.py:113: in test_seal_packet_generates_proofs assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rule_update_admin_flags_affected_packet
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_acn_cross_border.py:211: in test_rule_update_admin_flags_affected_packet assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Admin only"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rule_update_invalid_code_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_acn_cross_border.py:226: in test_rule_update_invalid_code_400 assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
